channel.title: History on My Kata Life
channel.description: Recent content in History on My Kata Life

item.title: Martial Arts Figures: Joe Lewis
item.description: Joe Lewis (1944–2012) was a legendary American martial artist, kickboxer, and actor, widely regarded as one of the greatest fighters in martial arts history. Let’s break down his story!

item.title: Orange Belt Martial Arts History
item.description: As we work our way from Yellow Belt to Orange Belt we are given some more things to learn. This time more about martial arts in general. Here are some of the things learned.

item.title: Yellow Belt Terms and Basic History
item.description: During the course of working from White belt to Yellow belt we are given a series of Basic Terms and History to introduce them into Karate. I took some of those questions and dug a bit deeper.
